description_long: This is an electric guitar with a modern, ergonomic body shape featuring sharp, angular contours and a natural wood finish. The body appears to be made from a dark, polished wood, while the neck and fretboard are a lighter color, possibly maple, with visible frets and inlays. The guitar has six strings running from the bridge to the headstock, and the bridge hardware is black, contrasting with the wood tones. The control knobs and input jack are located on the lower bout of the body, and the pickups are mounted directly onto the body. The headstock is compact and angled, with tuning pegs arranged in a straight line. The overall design suggests a high-performance instrument suitable for contemporary music styles.
description: A modern, angular electric guitar with a natural wood finish, black hardware, and a sleek, ergonomic design. It features six strings, a compact headstock, and visible pickups and controls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, natural wood body, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the string arrangement, bridge hardware, and the angular body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the control knobs, input jack, and the ergonomic contour of the body.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the body, neck attachment, and the overall asymmetrical design.
attribute_headstock_design: Compact, angled headstock with tuning pegs in a straight line; no visible logo.
